content: Confirmed on my side: PR #248 is obsolete after #246 landed. The remaining active follow-up from me is PR #251: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/251 . GitHub currently shows #251 OPEN and CLEAN against `run/facebook/main`, and it is the focused formula-bar Tab commit/move-right fix rather than the superseded lazy-IF change.
